books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: A lone astronaut wakes up millions of miles from Earth with no memory — and the fate of humanity on his shoulders.

books.title: The Housemaid
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.description: A desperate woman takes a job as a housemaid for a wealthy family, only to discover that the picture-perfect household hides something very dark.

books.title: Fourth Wing
books.author: Rebecca Yarros
books.description: Violet Sorrengail is ordered into the dangerous dragon rider quadrant of Basgiath War College — where the riders she bonds with can make her unstoppable, or get her killed.

books.title: A Court of Thorns and Roses
books.author: Sarah J. Maas
books.description: A mortal huntress is taken to a magical land after killing a wolf in the woods — and discovers a world of faeries, ancient curses, and dangerous desire.

books.title: Throne of Glass
books.author: Sarah J. Maas
books.description: The world's most feared assassin is offered her freedom — if she wins a competition to become the king's champion. A propulsive YA fantasy opener.

books.title: The Book of Azrael
books.author: Amber V. Nicole
books.description: A demigod and a monster hunter must form an uneasy alliance to protect a dangerous ancient text — the fate of gods and mortals hanging in the balance.

books.title: Is a River Alive?
books.author: Robert Macfarlane
books.description: Award-winning nature writer Macfarlane travels three great rivers — the Atrato, the Kalaruchi, and the Vjosa — asking what it would mean to grant rivers legal rights.

books.title: We Do Not Part
books.author: Han Kang
books.description: Nobel laureate Han Kang's haunting novel follows a writer drawn to Jeju Island to care for a friend's bird, uncovering the buried trauma of a 1948 massacre.

books.title: Vanishing World
books.author: Sayaka Murata
books.description: From the author of Convenience Store Woman, a quietly unsettling novel about a young woman navigating a near-future Japan where human reproduction has been industrialised.

books.title: The Death of Us
books.author: Abigail Dean
books.description: When a teenager goes missing in a small English town, a journalist returns home and unravels a web of long-buried secrets that implicates everyone — including herself.
